A produced in cold regions.
Useful for surviving in cold climates.

A produced in hot regions.
Boasts high heat resistance.

Improved .
Increases carrying capacity.

A crystal formed from condensed World Tree energy.
It awakens Pals, releasing their hidden power.

A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body.
When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Pals.

Ammo for the .
Can be crafted at .
Gloves for modifying the performance of the equipped glider, if is in your team.

A useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing damage to enemies.
Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.

[Tides of Terraria]
A lantern that radiates a rainbow-hued light.
Holding it aloft releases homing light projectiles that strike enemies multiple times.

[Tides of Terraria]
A mystical sword with a rainbow-colored blade.
Wielding it lets you summon up to nine blessed swords to fight alongside you.

[Tides of Terraria]
A powerful gun fueled by unknown energy.
Fires homing missiles at regular intervals that track enemies and explode on impact.
Has a 66% chance to not consume ammo when firing.

[Tides of Terraria]
A sacred sword that gleams with golden light.
Swinging it unleashes shockwaves around you.

[Tides of Terraria]
Armor forged from .
Enveloped in divine power, it lessens damage from [Tides of Terraria] monsters.

[Tides of Terraria]
Helmet forged from .
Enveloped in divine power, it increases damage dealt by , , , and .

[Tides of Terraria]
This curious sword releases vibrant green shockwaves with each strike, allowing you to hit enemies from afar despite being a melee weapon.

A beam rifle crafted with advanced technology.
Charges energy to deliver one powerful shot.

A beautiful feathered headband.
Though improbable, it somehow seems to protect its wearer from lethal head injuries.

A bow crafted from Soralite Ingots.
With greatly enhanced initial velocity and piercing power, this high-precision weapon excels at ranged combat.

A bow reconstructed with advanced technology.
Capable of firing extremely powerful arrows.

A Gatling Gun capable of rapid fire.
Mows down enemies with suppressive fire.

A grenade launcher made from Soralite Ingots.
Improved trajectory stability allows for precise long-range bombings.

A handgun created from spare parts.
Relatively well suited for close-quarters combat, but fires only one shot at a time.

A helm made from .
Envied for its immaculate quality, it is proof of a chosen warrior.

A helm made from high quality metal.
The luster from the polished metal gives the wearer that added boost of confidence.

A helm made of metal.
A reliable piece of armor that protects your head, and all the thoughts within.

A launcher that fires drones which perform autonomous attacks.
Capable of deploying up to 9 units, enabling sustained suppression.

A made from Soralite Ingots.
A close-range weapon that instantly cuts targets using its high-output energy blade.

A missile launcher that can hold multiple ammo at once.
Fires a series of missiles that automatically track and follow enemies.

A modernized bow.
Capable of firing more powerful arrows.

A rapid-fire shotgun with immense power.
Its close-range damage output is top-notch.

A rifle that allows for a certain degree of rapid fire.
It’s easy to aim and has high firepower, making it effective for mid-range combat.
A rifle that releases an electrical discharge from the point of impact, which chains to multiple enemies.

A shotgun handmade from scraps.
It has a short range but excels in close-range combat

A shotgun made from Soralite Ingots.
It delivers overwhelming firepower at close range, and its special magazine also provides high sustained combat capability.

A shotgun that fires energy rounds.
Excelling in rapid fire, its close-range firepower is truly otherworldly.

A single-shot rifle. Takes time to load.
What it lacks in capacity, it makes up for with sheer power.

A slightly outdated revolving handgun.
Compared to , it excels in single-shot power.

A specialized beam weapon for close-range combat.
It fires compressed energy in a wide, scattering blast.

A submachine gun handmade from scraps.
It excels in rate of fire, but its single-shot power is low.

A submachine gun made from Soralite Ingots.
Its improved magazine and ammunition enhance its suppression power.

A submachine gun with exceptional rate of fire.
It’s easy to handle and effective in close-range combat.

A that works well in close combat.
Use it to beat down anyone you don't like.

A weapon that fires high-energy lasers.
It has impressive firepower and is easy to handle.

A weathered map showing where treasure lies.
Using it places a marker on your map.

An .
A mysterious egg imbued with the energy of the World Tree.
Place it in a to incubate it.

An ancient helmet forged from .
It is imbued with wisdom passed down through the ages, protecting its wearer with unwavering strength.
Its defensive capabilities far surpass those of modern equipment.

An assault rifle capable of firing endlessly without reloading.
Prolonged bursts cause overheating, leaving you exposed.
Use with caution.

An assault rifle handmade from scraps.
It excels in rate of fire and long range, but its single-shot power is low.

An assault rifle made from Soralite Ingots.
It has been enhanced to handle powerful ammo while maintaining its versatility.

Ancient armor forged from .
Crafted with the essence of a lost civilization, it boasts overwhelming defensive power and is capable of withstanding cataclysmic threats.

Armor made of .
In addition to enhanced defense capabilities, its weight was also reduced.
Equipment that pushes the limits of technology.

Armor made of .
Possesses overwhelming durability and defense.

Fires a high-density beam that causes explosions over a wide area.
Caution is required to prevent overheating during rapid fire.

Fires beam-like energy blasts at high speed.
Its overwhelming firepower can take down multiple enemies at once.

Fires grenades that cause wide-ranging explosions.
Useful when dealing with a large number of enemies.

Fires high-output energy projectiles.
Causes an energy explosion upon impact.

Fires missiles that automatically track and pursue enemies.
Missiles explode upon impact, causing damage over a wide area.

for close-range combat.
Slices through opponents, burning them with a high-output laser.

for close-range combat.
Slices through with razor-sharp precision, cutting cleanly in one strike.

for close-range combat.
The blade is extremely sharp! Mightier than a pen, for sure.

Combines incredible strength and lightness.

Helmet made of .

Equipment that pushes the limits of technology.

Refined .
It is equipped with ancient auxiliary mechanisms, allowing the wearer to carry more supplies.

Refined .
Its cold resistance has been further enhanced using ancient technology, allowing the wearer to maintain their strength even in extreme cold regions.

Refined .
Its heat resistance has been further enhanced using ancient technology, allowing it to endure scorching environments

Simple, old fashioned gun.
Fires a single, powerful shot at the expense of a long reload time.

Strange gun that paints a picture of where it is fired.
Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!

that fires long-range flame.
Can set the enemy on fire.

Wreaks havoc at close range. Can fire twice before reloading.
Despite the limited load capacity, it still packs a punch.

[ULTRAKILL Collab]
A shotgun powered by heat, capable of firing endlessly.
When equipped, throwing a Pal Sphere is replaced with Core Eject.
Hold to charge and extend its range. Cores hit by shots from will explode.

[ULTRAKILL Collab]
An electrically powered revolver capable of firing endlessly.
When equipped, Pal Sphere throws are replaced with Coin Toss.
Hitting a coin with the causes the bullet to ricochet toward enemies.

[ULTRAKILL Collab]
Armor modeled after the Final War machine built in a distant land.
It features a self-repair system that activates when dealing damage.

[ULTRAKILL Collab]
Armor modeled after the New Peace machine built in a distant land.
Its self-repair system was removed in favor of sturdier plating.

A fishing rod designed for catching Pals.

A lantern that can be attached to the hip.

You can also switch its lighting mode to keep it on at all times.

A bizarre species which temporarily separates its body and uses its bones to slice through enemies, at the risk of perishing itself upon taking too long. While unconfirmed, older individuals are said to deliberately stay separated in order to trigger their survival instincts and prolong their lifespans.
